    1. UniquenessViolationException(String)

Class UniquenessViolationException

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Throwable
java.lang.Exception
java.lang.RuntimeException
org.tquadrat.foundation.sql.UniquenessViolationException
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: UniquenessViolationException.java 1150 2025-09-29 09:14:54Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.4.1") public final class UniquenessViolationException extends RuntimeException
This exception will be thrown in cases where it is expected that a SELECT statement should return not more than one single record, but the ResultSet holds two or more records.
Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Version:
$Id: UniquenessViolationException.java 1150 2025-09-29 09:14:54Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.4.1
